revenue: $980.8 million (YoY comparison unavailable due to document omission)
net_income: Net loss of $855.8 million (down from net earnings of $138.5 million in Q2 2024)
qoq_changes: Goodwill decreased from $2,278.2 million at year-end 2024 to $1,256.8 million due to a massive impairment charge.
Inventories increased from $274.2 million at year-end 2024 to $417.1 million.
Cash and cash equivalents decreased from $695.0 million at year-end 2024 to $546.9 million.
new_risks: Risks associated with the integration of artificial intelligence (AI) into product development, marketing, and consumer engagement, including ethical concerns and evolving regulatory standards.
Challenges in attracting and retaining talented and diverse employees following recent workforce reductions.
management_tone: Cautious; while management remains focused on executing its 'Playing to Win' strategy and technological transformation, the quarter's financials were severely impacted by a $1.02 billion goodwill impairment.
analyst_note: Hasbro's Q2 2025 results were heavily overshadowed by a $1.02 billion goodwill impairment, driving a substantial net loss of $855.8 million despite generating $980.8 million in revenue. Investors should closely monitor the company's inventory build-up, the execution and regulatory risks of its new AI integration strategy, and operational stability following recent workforce reductions.
